title: equisetum ramosissimum var. subverticillata
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. subverticillata is a type of horsetail plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract issues and kidney stones due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Equisetum ramosissimum var. subverticillata is typically prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used in powder or capsule form as a dietary supplement.
